title: Backend Developer Vacancy at NIIT Technologies South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at NIIT Technologies South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
NIIT Technologies South Asia Partners has an exciting opening for a Backend Developer at our Jabalpur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About NIIT Technologies South Asia Partners:
NIIT Technologies South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Docker

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NIIT Technologies South Asia Partners!
